user.title: Set up Calee
user.description: This will create your planner with default calendars and lists. Choose where to store your data.

database.title: Database Connection
database.description: Enter your database connection details. For the MariaDB add-on, the default host is core-mariadb.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the database. Check your credentials and ensure the database exists.
